next_steps: Send CSF for Angiostrongylus cantonensis PCR
Send CSF and serum for parasitic serologies (Angiostrongylus, Gnathostoma, Strongyloides)
Perform contrast-enhanced MRI of the brain and entire spine
Send CSF for fungal and mycobacterial studies (including PCR and culture)
Consult Infectious Disease and Neurology specialists
Continue broad-spectrum empirical coverage until specific pathogen identified
